name: Corn Lightbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients in a large bowl and mix well.
2. Gradually add the buttermilk and oil, stirring until just combined.
3. Grease a lightly greased 9-inch x 5-inch loaf pan.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and smooth the top with a spatula.
5. Let stand for 10 minutes before baking.
6. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before turning off the heat and removing from the pan to serve.
